title: Label Imbalance Analysis
objective: Assess binary and ordinal target imbalance overall and by cohort.
method: Computed target counts, percentages, and imbalance ratios for `num` and `disease_binary`.
results: Binary classes are moderately imbalanced with ratio 1.24:1.
Ordinal class 4 is rare with 28 rows (3.04%).
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Multiclass modeling would be limited by sparse severe-disease classes.
